attributes.action: No confidence in present government, call a new General Election
attributes.additional_details: The people of the United Kingdom have no confidence in the present government and call for a new General Election.
attributes.background: The people of the United Kingdom have no confidence in the present government and call for a new General Election.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Dissolve Parliament and call a General Election now!
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/750050
